name: 13 fl oz Glass Mug with Decal Gold Heart - Spritz™
description:
Sip your favorite drinks in style with the 13 fl oz Glass Mug with Decal Gold Heart from Spritz™. Crafted from durable stoneware, its Valentine's-themed design makes it a delightful choice for your drinkware collection. The mug comfortably holds up to 13 ounces, perfect for keeping your beverages warm or cool, whether you're starting your morning or taking a moment to unwind.

Spritz™: Pops of joy that make the moment™
